title: TNEA Colleges List for Cutoff Marks 120-140

detail.title: TNEA Colleges List for Cutoff Marks 120-140
detail.short_info: Discover the best TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 120 to 140 in Tamil Nadu. Get the complete list of colleges, previous year cutoffs, counselling process, and top branches you can get with 120-140 marks in TNEA 2026.

content.text: TNEA Engineering Colleges for Cutoff Marks Between 120 to 140 in Tamil Nadu offer viable options for students with moderate scores in their Class 12 PCM subjects (scaled to 200 marks). Around 220+ participating colleges in TNEA counselling have average cutoffs in this range, providing access to B.E./B.Tech programs in branches like CSE, ECE, Mechanical, Civil, and more, primarily in private self-financing and some university colleges.

sections.heading: Overview of TNEA Colleges for 120-140 Cutoff Marks

content.text: Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA), conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE) via Anna University, is a single-window online counselling process based purely on Class 12 marks (no separate entrance exam like JEE). Cutoffs are scaled to 200 (Maths: 100, Physics: 50, Chemistry: 50) and vary by category (OC highest), branch, and college demand.

For 120-140 marks, expect ranks roughly in the 50,000–1,00,000+ range (varies yearly). These colleges are suitable for students targeting affordable private institutions with decent infrastructure, placements in core/IT sectors, and locations across Tamil Nadu. Focus on choice filling for popular branches in earlier rounds.

sections.heading: TNEA Colleges List for Cutoff Marks 120-140

content.text: The table below lists colleges sorted by average cutoff (lowest to highest in the 120-140 range). Data is based on previous year trends for the overall college average (not branch-specific). Actual cutoffs fluctuate; use for guidance only.

rows: K S R College of Engineering (Autonomous)
Misrimal Navajee Munoth Jain Engineering College
K S R Institute for Engineering and Technology (Autonomous)
SSM Institute of Engineering and Technology
Annai Mira College of Engineering and Technology
AAA College of Engineering and Technology
C Abdul Hakeem College of Engineering and Technology
Annamalai University Faculty of Engineering and Technology
A V C College of Engineering, Mannampandal

items: Registration & Application — Online on tneaonline.org (typically May-June). Upload documents and pay fee.
Rank List — Prepared based on Class 12 marks + random number.
Certificate Verification — Online/offline as per schedule.
Choice Filling — Select colleges and branches in order of preference.
Allotment & Confirmation — Multiple rounds; confirm seat and report/pay fees.
Supplementary/SCA to SC Rounds — If seats remain.

content.text: Always refer to the official TNEA counselling PDF for exact steps and dates.

sections.heading: Factors to Consider When Choosing Colleges

items: Branch Demand — CSE/IT/ECE usually have higher cutoffs within the college.
Fees & Scholarships — Government quota vs. management seats.
Placements — Check average package, recruiters (IT companies common).
Infrastructure & Accreditation — NAAC, autonomy status.
Location — Chennai/Coimbatore clusters offer better exposure.

content.text: Civil, Mechanical, EEE, ECE (in good colleges), and sometimes CSE in lower-tier or distant colleges. Aim for strong choice lists.

seo_tags: engineering colleges Tamil Nadu low cutoff
